calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-25-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Petitioner's Petition for Change of Name.

Dept. 505; Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: N Webb. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 1:43 pm and concluding at 1:50 pm.

Petitioner John Allen Tyrell Nalls is present in pro per, placed under oath and testifies.

The Court Finds:
Petitioner did not include his entire legal name on the Publication as is required by law.

Petition is denied; Petitioner to refile the Petition for Change of Name. (D505)
